data.title: Laurie Stewart, President and CEO of Sound Community Bank, named one of American Banker’s "Most Powerful Women To Watch."
data.description: In Seattle on September 24, 2025, Laurie Stewart, who serves as the President and CEO of Sound Community Bank, has been recognized by American Banker as one of The Most Powerful Women to Watch this year. This prestigious acknowledgment highlights Stewart's notable success and influence in the banking sector.

data.title: Cybercriminals sell Maryland transit data for $3.4M in Bitcoin. Ransomware operator auctions sensitive info from DOT.
data.description: Hackers are currently selling confidential information from the Maryland Department of Transportation through a ransomware auction. The data is being offered for $3.4 million in Bitcoin.

data.title: Moderate-to-severe acute pain market set for 14% CAGR growth from 2020-2034, with emerging therapies boosting segment in 7MM.
data.description: The market size for moderate-to-severe acute pain in the 7 major markets (7MM) is projected to grow steadily from 2025 to 2034. This growth is fueled by the introduction of new therapies like RizaFilm (rizatriptan), CPL-01, PRF-110, OCS-01, F14 (mdc-CWM), NTM-001, Cebranopadol, and others.

data.title: Alejandro Vallejo named Chief People Officer at PG&E, effective Sept. 30. Leading culture of safety and joy.
data.description: Alejandro "Alex" Vallejo has been appointed as the Executive Vice President and Chief People Officer of PG&E Corporation and its subsidiary, Pacific Gas and Electric Company (collectively known as "PG&E") starting from September 30, 2025. Vallejo, a prominent figure at PG&E, will be taking on this key role within the corporation. This announcement was made on September 24, 2025, in Oakland, California.

data.title: Sapia.ai names Kim Macdonald as Head of Growth to lead enterprise expansion in Sydney.
data.description: Sapia.ai, a company based in Sydney, recently announced the appointment of Kim Macdonald as the Head of Growth. Macdonald will lead efforts to expand the enterprise and drive growth within the company. This move signifies the company's commitment to furthering its reach in the market.

data.title: Opendoor stock rises as Jane Street acquires 5.9% stake, holding 44,031,310.18 shares. Check out real-time price action.
data.description: Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) saw a surge in its shares during Wednesday's after-hours trading following the revelation of Jane Street Group acquiring a stake in the company. The stock is currently trading at a higher value. Jane Street Group disclosed in a 13G filing that they now collectively hold 44,031,310.18 shares of OPEN, equivalent to 5.9% of the company's total outstanding common stock. The Schedule 13G filing is a mandatory disclosure document. More information on this story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Air Canada estimates Q3 2025 results: capacity to drop by 2%, $250-300M operating income, $950M-$1B EBITDA due to 3,200 flight cancellations. Labour disruption impact of $375M estimated, leading to net $375M loss. Updated full year 2025 guidance: adjusted EBITDA $2.9-3.1B, ASM capacity up 0.5-1.5%, adjusted CASM 14.60-14.70¢, free cash flow -$50M to $150M. Arbitration ongoing with CUPE regarding wages. Major assumptions include Canadian GDP growth and exchange rate assumptions. Non-GAAP financial measures emphasized.
data.description: Air Canada provided estimated results for Q3 2025, with a decline in capacity by approximately 2% due to the cancellation of over 3,200 flights and operating income expected between $250-300 million. The financial impact of the labour disruption by CUPE is estimated at $375 million in operating income and adjusted EBITDA. The revenue impact of the disruption is estimated at $430 million, while costs avoided due to less flying activity were around $145 million. The full-year 2025 guidance has been updated, with adjusted EBITDA expected to be $2.9-3.1 billion and ASM capacity to increase by 0.5-1.5% versus 2024. Air Canada deeply regrets the disruption on customers and has resolved over 60,000 claims to date. Arbitration with CUPE is ongoing, and the company is restoring its full-year guidance to reflect the impact of the labour disruption. Major assumptions include Canadian GDP growth and exchange rates. Kindly refer to the full news article on Benzinga.com for more information.

data.title: PRA Group priced €300 million of 6.250% Senior Notes due 2032. News by PRAA, a nonperforming loans leader.
data.description: In Norfolk, Virginia on September 24, 2025, PRA Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: PRAA) disclosed its latest update. The company, known for its expertise in obtaining and managing nonperforming loans worldwide, revealed news about its subsidiary, PRA Group Europe Holding II S.à r.l. Luxembourg, a private limited liability entity.

data.title: Gemmy's Halloween Airblown® inflatables offer a mix of fright and delight for decorators, available at Walmart.
data.description: Gemmy's Halloween Airblown® lights are offering a wide range of options for decorators this Halloween, available at Walmart starting on September 24, 2025. Whether you prefer a frightening or cheerful theme, there is something for everyone in this collection. The Airblown® lineup caters to all tastes with a variety of spooky and fun decorations. Make sure not to miss this spirited opportunity for adding some magic to your Halloween this year!

data.title: $30,000 grant from FHLB Dallas and FBT Bank & Mortgage supports growth at Home Again Pine Bluff by hiring administrative assistant.
data.description: Located in Pine Bluff, Arkansas, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) and FBT Bank & Mortgage have granted $30,000 through the Partnership Grant Program (PGP) to Home Again Pine Bluff. This non-profit organization aiding families in Pine Bluff with homeownership will utilize the funds to employ an administrative assistant in order to enhance its growing operations. The contribution highlights a shared dedication to community development and economic empowerment.

data.title: TÜV Rheinland NA in Pleasanton, CA expands testing for refrigeration equipment with 2 MEAS standards.
data.description: In Pleasanton, California, TÜV Rheinland North America has announced an expansion in their certification capabilities at their laboratory. They have added two important MEAS standards to their services.

data.title: Intel stock increased 6% as it seeks investment from Apple; both exploring deeper collaboration, preliminary talks ongoing.
data.description: Intel Corp's stock (INTC) saw a surge on Wednesday after news emerged about the company approaching Apple, Inc. (AAPL) for a potential investment. The stock of INTC rose following the report. The companies have also been in talks to enhance their partnership, although these discussions are in the early stages and may not lead to a formal agreement, as per Reuters. While Intel and Apple have not provided any official statements on the subject, Intel's shares jumped by 6% after the news broke out. For more in-depth coverage, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dream Residential REIT is sending circular for special meeting with unitholders to approve acquisition by Morgan Properties. TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN.
data.description: In Toronto, Dream Residential Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN) disclosed sending out its Management Information Circular for the upcoming special meeting of unitholders to approve the proposed transaction with Morgan Properties. The Circular and associated documents have been mailed to Unitholders. The Meeting will involve unitholders of the REIT and Class B unitholders of DRR Holdings LLC. Key numbers: TSX: DRR.U, TSX: DRR.UN, Morgan Properties.
